recommendations.title: Spider
recommendations.overview: A young man tries to make things right again in his relationship after he and his girlfriend get in a fight.

recommendations.title: The Invisible Man
recommendations.overview: When Cecilia's abusive ex takes his own life and leaves her his fortune, she suspects his death was a hoax. As a series of coincidences turn lethal, Cecilia works to prove that she is being hunted by someone nobody can see.

recommendations.title: The Square
recommendations.overview: Ray, a construction worker trapped in an unhappy marriage, pursues an affair with his neighbor, Carla. Carla's husband, Greg, is a mobster who keeps large sums of drug money in their home. With this in mind, Carla comes up with a plan: She and Ray wi

recommendations.title: El Infierno
recommendations.overview: After being deported back to Mexico, a man has no choice but to join the vicious drug cartel that has corrupted his hometown in order to survive.

recommendations.title: Sin Nombre
recommendations.overview: Sayra, a Honduran teen, hungers for a better life. Her chance for one comes when she is reunited with her long-estranged father, who intends to emigrate to Mexico and then enter the United States. Sayra's life collides with a pair of Mexican gangmemb

recommendations.title: A Fantastic Woman
recommendations.overview: Marina's life is thrown into turmoil following the death of her partner. Mourning the loss of the man she loved, she finds herself under intense scrutiny from those with no regard for her privacy.

recommendations.title: You Can Count on Me
recommendations.overview: A single mother's life is thrown into turmoil after her struggling, rarely-seen younger brother returns to town.

recommendations.title: Destiny
recommendations.overview: Bekir loves Uğur, who loves Zagor, who is about to get out of jail. An already tense love triangle is thrown into turmoil on a hot summer night, when Zagor kills someone, and Uğur disappears.

recommendations.title: The Exorcism of God
recommendations.overview: An American priest working in Mexico is considered a saint by many local parishioners. However, due to a botched exorcism, he carries a secret that’s eating him alive until he gets an opportunity to face his demon one final time.

recommendations.title: The Rover
recommendations.overview: Ten years after a severe economic collapse in the western world, lawlessness reigns and life is cheap. Eric is a lone drifter, and his car is his only possession. When a gang steals it, Eric comes across the injured Rey, left behind by the car thieve
